name: Honey Curried Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 teaspoons Curry powder or garam masala
1 teaspoon Ginger, grated or finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In an oiled Baking Dish, arrange chicken skin side down.
2. Combine all other ingredients in a bowl and stir until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
4. Refrigerate for 1 hour (or longer if desired).
5. Drain any excess sauce into a cup.
6. Bake the chicken uncovered at 375°F (190°C) for 20 minutes.
7. Turn the chicken over and baste with remaining sauce.
8. Bake for another 20-30 minutes, or until tender and no pink remains, basting periodically.
9. Serve with rice, noodles, or a baked potato.
